name: UwS Main Building (Rektorat)
description: Main administrative building and rectorate of the University in Siedlce.

name: Faculty of Exact and Natural Sciences
description: Faculty building for computer science, mathematics, and natural sciences.

name: UwS Main Library
description: University library with study rooms, computer stations, and book lending.

name: International Relations Office
description: Erasmus coordination office. First stop for all exchange students on arrival.

name: DS5 - Dom Studenta nr 5 (Erasmus Dormitory)
description: Dom Studenta nr 5 (Student House 5). This is the designated dormitory for all Erasmus and exchange students at UwS. When you first arrive in Siedlce, come directly here to check in at the reception desk with your passport and acceptance letter. Reception is open 24/7.

name: Siedlce Railway Station (PKP)
description: Main train station. Direct trains to Warsaw (1.5h), Lublin, and Terespol (Belarus border).

name: Siedlce Bus Station (PKS)
description: Regional and long-distance bus station. FlixBus stop for intercity travel.

name: Galeria Siedlce (Shopping Mall)
description: Largest shopping mall in Siedlce. Includes supermarket, clothing stores, food court, and cinema.

name: Biedronka (City Center)
description: Budget-friendly supermarket. Cheapest option for daily groceries.

name: Lidl
description: German discount supermarket chain. Good quality products at low prices.

name: Siedlce City Hospital
description: Main public hospital with emergency department (SOR). Bring your EHIC card.

name: Apteka (Pharmacy - City Center)
description: Central pharmacy. Basic medicines available without prescription.

name: PKO BP ATM
description: PKO Bank Polski ATM. One of the largest Polish banks, low withdrawal fees.

name: Kantor (Currency Exchange)
description: Currency exchange office. Better rates than airport or bank exchanges.

name: Park Aleksandria
description: Historic park and green area in the city center. Popular spot for walking and relaxation.

name: Kebab Aladin
description: Popular kebab place among students. Affordable and filling meals.

name: Pizzeria Da Grasso
description: Popular pizza chain. Delivery available via Pyszne.pl or Glovo.

name: Poczta Polska (Post Office)
description: Main post office. Parcel pickup, letter sending, and bill payments.

name: Biedronka (Żytnia)
description: Closest Biedronka to DS5 (Erasmus dormitory). Budget-friendly with a wide product range -- best price-to-variety ratio near campus.

name: Topaz (Żytnia)
description: Walking distance from DS5 (Erasmus dormitory) -- the nearest supermarket. Slightly pricier than Biedronka but convenient for quick daily shopping.

name: Żabka (CS Faculty)
description: Convenience store right next to the Computer Science faculty. Quick snacks, drinks, and essentials between classes.
